final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: historical-art-reproduction
Asset type: Chinese scroll painting, panoramic format
Primary request: panoramic view of Tang Dynasty Chang'an city during Lantern Festival, thousands of lanterns illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: Tang Dynasty Chang'an cityscape at night, palace towers, city gates, bustling streets filled with festival crowds, river reflecting lantern lights
Subject: grand Lantern Festival celebration with countless traditional Chinese lanterns of various shapes and sizes, citizens in Tang-era attire enjoying the festivities
Style/medium: gongbi zhongcai (meticulous brushwork with heavy colors), traditional Chinese scroll painting style, Tang Dynasty artistic tradition
Composition/framing: wide panoramic bird's-eye view, sweeping horizontal composition capturing the entire cityscape
Lighting/mood: warm golden lantern glow contrasting with deep indigo night sky, festive and majestic atmosphere
Color palette: rich mineral pigments, vermilion, gold, ultramarine, malachite green, warm amber lantern light
Materials/textures: silk scroll texture, fine brushwork details, layered mineral color application, traditional ink wash backgrounds
Constraints: maintain authentic Tang Dynasty architectural details, preserve the "万盏花灯" scale and grandeur
Avoid: anachronistic elements, modern lighting, photographic realism, Western perspective techniques, cartoonish simplification
